name: @bynu/alumni-miniapp
description: Taro 4.x 小程序入口：Phase 1a 文档化占位（DEGRADED），Phase 1b 起接入真实 Taro 构建。

scripts.dev:weapp: echo [alumni-miniapp DEGRADED] Phase 1b 接入 Taro dev --type weapp
scripts.build:weapp: echo [alumni-miniapp DEGRADED] Phase 1b 接入 Taro build --type weapp
scripts.test: echo [alumni-miniapp DEGRADED] 小程序端单测延后至 Phase 1b
